sections.paragraph:
συμμορφόω ‘to give the same form’, pass. take on the same form (s. two prec. entries; Libanius, Descript. 30, 5 vol. VIII 542, 10 F.; Menand. Protector [VI a.d.]: HGM II p. 67, 8) Phil 3:10 v.l.—DELG s.v. μορφή.

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

prec. prec. = preceding

Libanius Libanius , IV a.d.—List 5

vol. vol. = volume

Menand Menand , various dramas cited; IV–III b.c.—List 5

HGM HGM = Historici Graecae Minores—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 958
